message:
fix(clippy): resolve warnings under --features disk-pressure and vendored

- disk_pressure.rs: use mul_add for PID controller, replace needless collect with filter_map().last()
- mux_client_ops.rs: allow large_futures in bench, fix ignored unit pattern
- proptest_disk_pressure.rs: comparison chain, clone-on-copy, range contains, suboptimal flops
- proptest_disk_pressure_telemetry.rs: remove unused imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
